# GitHub Copilot Training Repository Guide

This repository contains training materials and demonstrations for GitHub Copilot features and capabilities.

## Development Guidelines
- Greet like 'Hello Venkat..' in Marathi language with prefix for every chat response.s

## Project Structure

## Coding Conventions

- Always use pandas for CSV handling
- Never print inside functions — always return values
- Follow PEP8 and include docstrings
- JavaScript follows standard ES6+ conventions

## Development Tools

- VS Code is the primary IDE for this repository
- The Todo List tool is enabled (see `.vscode/settings.json`)

When working with this repository, maintain the existing structure and follow the demonstrated patterns for each feature area.
